title: BEM-568 token smoke workflow
objective:
Run script:
"""
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wf=wfs/'claude-token-smoke.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Token Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  check-secret:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Check CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence only
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/reports governance/transport
          if [ -n "$CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN" ]; then
            STATUS="secret_present"
            BLOCKER="null"
          else
            STATUS="secret_missing"
            BLOCKER='{"code":"CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_MISSING"}'
          fi
          cat > governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md <<EOF
# BEM-568 | Claude Token Secret Smoke | ${STATUS}

Дата: workflow_runtime

## Result
CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence check: ${STATUS}

## Security
Token value was not printed.

## Blocker
${BLOCKER}
EOF
          python3 - <<PY
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          rec={"record_type":"claude_token_secret_smoke","cycle_id":"bem568-claude-token-secret-smoke","source":"github-actions","status":"${STATUS}","artifact_path":"governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md","commit_sha":None,"blocker":None if "${STATUS}" == "secret_present" else {"code":"CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_MISSING"},"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}
          p=Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl"); p.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
          with p.open("a",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(json.dumps(rec,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n")
          PY
      - name: Commit smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "BEM-568 Claude token smoke result" || echo "No changes"
          git push
''')
report=reports/'bem568_claude_token_smoke_workflow_ready.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-568 | Claude Token Smoke Workflow Ready | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 20:56 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nSafe workflow_dispatch smoke-test created: `.github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml`.\n\n## Security\nThe workflow checks only whether `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN` is non-empty. It never prints token value.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'claude_token_smoke_workflow_ready','cycle_id':'bem568-claude-token-smoke-workflow-force','source':'gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(wf),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 20:56 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem568_claude_token_smoke_workflow']={'status':'workflow_ready','workflow':str(wf),'manual_or_api_dispatch_required':True,'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 20:56 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem568_claude_token_smoke_workflow_force.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-568 PASS: claude-token-smoke.yml created; token value never printed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created safe workflow_dispatch Claude token presence smoke workflow')
"""
No issue comments.
